debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
A : Set U
B : Set V
a : U
b : V
f : U → V
h1 : one_one_on f A
h2 : image f A = B
h3 : a ∈ A
h4 : f a = b
⊢ ↑(A \ {a}) ∼ ↑(B \ {b})

proof:
by
  have hg : ∀ x : ↑(A \ {a}), f x.val ∈ B \ {b} := by
    intro x
    constructor
    · rw [← h2]; exact ⟨x.val, x.prop.left, rfl⟩
    · intro hfxb
      have heq : x.val = a := h1 x.prop.left h3 (by rw [hfxb, h4])
      exact x.prop.right heq
  let g : ↑(A \ {a}) → ↑(B \ {b}) := fun x => ⟨f x.val, hg x⟩
  use g
  constructor
  · intro x1 x2 hgeq
    have heq : f x1.val = f x2.val := congrArg Subtype.val hgeq
    exact Subtype.ext (h1 x1.prop.left x2.prop.left heq)
  · intro y
    have hyB : y.val ∈ image f A := by rw [h2]; exact y.prop.left
    obtain ⟨x, hxA, hfx⟩ := hyB
    have hxna : x ≠ a := by
      intro heq
      rw [heq, h4] at hfx
      exact y.prop.right hfx.symm
    exact ⟨⟨x, hxA, hxna⟩, Subtype.ext hfx⟩
successful_attempts:
by
  have hg : ∀ x : ↑(A \ {a}), f x.val ∈ B \ {b} := by
    intro x
    constructor
    · rw [← h2]; exact ⟨x.val, x.prop.left, rfl⟩
    · intro hfxb
      have heq : x.val = a := h1 x.prop.left h3 (by rw [hfxb, h4])
      exact x.prop.right heq
  let g : ↑(A \ {a}) → ↑(B \ {b}) := fun x => ⟨f x.val, hg x⟩
  use g
  constructor
  · intro x1 x2 hgeq
    have heq : f x1.val = f x2.val := congrArg Subtype.val hgeq
    exact Subtype.ext (h1 x1.prop.left x2.prop.left heq)
  · intro y
    have hyB : y.val ∈ image f A := by rw [h2]; exact y.prop.left
    obtain ⟨x, hxA, hfx⟩ := hyB
    have hxna : x ≠ a := by
      intro heq
      rw [heq, h4] at hfx
      exact y.prop.right hfx.symm
    exact ⟨⟨x, hxA, hxna⟩, Subtype.ext hfx⟩
